name: dns_query_win_remote_access_software_domains_non_browsers
raw_query: any where ((dns.question.name like~ ("*agent.jumpcloud.com", "*agentreporting.atera.com", "*ammyy.com", "*api.parsec.app", "*api.playanext.com", "*api.splashtop.com", "*app.atera.com", "*assist.zoho.com", "*authentication.logmeininc.com", "*beyondtrustcloud.com", "*cdn.kaseya.net", "*client.teamviewer.com", "*comserver.corporate.beanywhere.com", "*control.connectwise.com", "*downloads.zohocdn.com", "*dwservice.net", "*express.gotoassist.com", "*getgo.com", "*getscreen.me", "*integratedchat.teamviewer.com", "*join.zoho.com", "*kickstart.jumpcloud.com", "*license.bomgar.com", "*logmein-gateway.com", "*logmein.com", "*logmeincdn.http.internapcdn.net", "*n-able.com", "*net.anydesk.com", "*netsupportsoftware.com", "*parsecusercontent.com", "*pubsub.atera.com", "*relay.kaseya.net", "*relay.screenconnect.com", "*relay.splashtop.com", "*remoteassistance.support.services.microsoft.com", "*remotedesktop-pa.googleapis.com", "*remoteutilities.com", "*secure.logmeinrescue.com", "*services.vnc.com", "*static.remotepc.com", "*swi-rc.com", "*swi-tc.com", "*tailscale.com", "*telemetry.servers.qetqo.com", "*tmate.io", "*twingate.com", "*zohoassist.com")) or (dns.question.name:"*.rustdesk.com" and dns.question.name:"rs-*")) and (not ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Mozilla Firefox\\firefox.exe")) or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Internet Explorer\\iexplore.exe")) or (process.executable:"C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeWebView\\Application\\*" or process.executable:"*\\WindowsApps\\MicrosoftEdge.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"))) or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\EdgeCore\\*")) and (process.executable like~ ("*\\msedge.exe", "*\\msedgewebview2.exe"))) or process.executable:"*\\safari.exe" or (process.executable like~ ("*\\MsMpEng.exe", "*\\MsSense.exe")) or (process.executable:"*\\brave.exe" and process.executable:"C:\\Program Files\\BraveSoftware\\*") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Maxthon\\*" and process.executable:"*\\maxthon.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\Opera\\*" and process.executable:"*\\opera.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SeaMonkey\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SeaMonkey\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\seamonkey.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Vivaldi\\*" and process.executable:"*\\vivaldi.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Naver\\Naver Whale\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\whale.exe") or process.executable:"*\\Tor Browser\\*" or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Waterfox\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Waterfox\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\Waterfox.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Programs\\midori-ng\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Midori Next Generation.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\SlimBrowser\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\SlimBrowser\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\slimbrowser.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Flock\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Flock.exe") or (process.executable:"*\\AppData\\Local\\Phoebe\\*" and process.executable:"*\\Phoebe.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files\\Falkon\\*", "C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Falkon\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\falkon.exe") or ((process.executable like~ ("C:\\Program Files (x86)\\Avant Browser\\*", "C:\\Program Files\\Avant Browser\\*")) and process.executable:"*\\avant.exe")))
